name: Spicy Chili Beans
recipeIngredient: 1 can Stewed tomatoes, low sodium (15 oz.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Canned beans cannot be used in this recipe; the cooking liquid from the dry beans makes a rich, flavorful broth that forms the base for the chili.
2. If you soak the beans overnight, you can cut the cooking time in half.
3. Freeze any leftover chili for a fast meal later. Serve over brown rice (make 3/4 cup per serving) and extra rice for tomorrow's breakfast.
4. Place the beans and water in a large pot. Bring to a boil, cover, reduce heat, and simmer for 2 hours.
5. Add the remaining ingredients and cook an additional 2 hours.
